title: Search Functionality for Users and Photos
description: Implement search feature allowing users to find other users by name/username and photos by tags or captions. Build search page with tab interface for Users/Photos results. Implement Postgres full-text search for efficient querying. Create search result cards for both content types. Add search to main navigation. Implement recent searches history (local storage). Support tag-based discovery by making tags on photos clickable to search. Out of scope: advanced filters, saved searches.
